title: Indulgent Italian Tomato Wrap
description: A savory, low‑calorie feast of tomato, mushroom, and chicken wrapped in lotus leaves, finished with a drizzle of olive oil and herbs.
instructions: Toast the lotus leaves in a dry pan until they become pliable, about 2 minutes each side.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté the mushrooms until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, oregano, salt, and pepper to the skillet and simmer for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the shredded chicken and allow the mixture to heat through, about 2 minutes.
Fold the tomato and mushroom mixture with shredded mozzarella into each lotus leaf, making a wrap.
Place the wrapped lotus leaves on a steaming rack and let them steam for 3 minutes to soften the leaves.
Serve each wrap immediately, garnished with fresh basil if desired.
